note: DuckTales 2 sources provided contain minimal audio documentation. Game has 5 main stages (Niagara Falls, Pirate Ship/Bermuda Triangle, Mu, Egypt, Scotland) plus optional 6th stage, but no musical parameters, tempo, keys, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics are documented in available sources. Wikipedia confirms composers as Minae Fujii and Akihiro Akamatsu but provides no track details or audio specifications.
